title: Concurrency and Locking Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on database concurrency and locking.

questions.question: What is the primary role of database concurrency?
options: To allow multiple users or applications to access and modify the same database at the same time

questions.question: Which of these is the most common way to coordinate concurrent access to database data?
Regarding optimistic vs pessimistic locking, which strategy is more common in modern application development?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
